
### coverage-guided example (1a) {.smaller}

:::::: {.columns}

::::: {.column width=30%}

```c
{{< include /testing/_coverage-example1.c >}}
```

:::::


::::: {.column .fragment fragment-index=1 style="font-size:90%"}

initial test case A: <br/>
a = `0x17`, b = `0x08`; covers: WZ

::: {.fragment fragment-index=2}

generate random test cases based on A:

<div style="border: 3px dashed black; width: fit-content; padding-left: .5rem; padding-right: .5rem; font-size: 90%">
a = `0x37`, b = `0x08`; covers: WZ <br />
a = `0x15`, b = `0x08`; covers: WZ <br />
a = `0x17`, b = `0x0c`; covers: WZ <br />
a = `0x13`, b = `0x08`; covers: WZ <br />
a = `0x17`, b = `0x08`; covers: WZ <br />
...<br/>
a = `0x17`, b = `0x00`; covers: <em>WY</em>
</div>

:::

::: {.fragment fragment-index=3}

found new test case with different coverage

:::

:::::

::::::

### coverage-guided example (1b) {.smaller}

:::::: {.columns}

::::: {.column width=30%}

```c
{{< include /testing/_coverage-example1.c >}}
```

:::::


::::: {.column style="font-size: 90%"}

initial test case A: <br/>
a = `0x17`, b = `0x08`; covers: WZ

found test case B (derived from A): <br/>
a = `0x17`, b = `0x00`; covers: WY

::: {.fragment fragment-index=2}

generate random test cases based on <em>A and B</em>:

<div style="border: 3px dashed black; width: fit-content; padding-left: .5rem; padding-right: .5rem; font-size: 90%">
a = `0x37`, b = `0x08`; covers: WZ <br/>
a = `0x04`, b = `0x00`; covers: WY <br/>
a = `0x17`, b = `0x01`; covers: WZ <br/>
a = `0x16`, b = `0x00`; covers: WY <br/>
... <br/>
a = `0x97`, b = `0x00`; covers: <em>WYQ</em> <br/>
... <br/>
a = `0x00`, b = `0x08`; covers: <em>XY</em> <br/>
</div>

:::


:::::

::::::


### coverage-guided example (1c) {.smaller}

:::::: {.columns}

::::: {.column width=30%}

```c
{{< include /testing/_coverage-example1.c >}}
```

:::::


::::: {.column style="font-size: 90%"}

initial test case A: <br/>
a = `0x17`, b = `0x08`; covers: WZ

found test case B (derived from A): <br/>
a = `0x17`, b = `0x00`; covers: WY

found test case C (derived from B): <br/>
a = `0x97`, b = `0x00`; covers: WYQ

found test case D (derived from A): <br/>
a = `0x00`, b = `0x08`; covers: XY

generate random test cases based on A and B and C and D:

...



:::::

::::::


### coverage-guided example (2a)

:::::: {.columns}

::::: {.column width=30%}

```c
{{< include /testing/_coverage-example2.c >}}
```

:::::


::::: {.column .fragment fragment-index=1 style="font-size:90%"}

initial test case A:<br/>
a = 0x17, b = 0x08, c = 0x00; covers: WZ


::: {.fragment fragment-index=2}

generate random test cases based on A:

<div style="border: 3px dashed black; width: fit-content; padding-left: .5rem; padding-right: .5rem; font-size: 90%">
a = `0x37`, b = `0x08`, c = `0x00`; covers: WZ <br/>
a = `0x15`, b = `0x08`, c = `0x02`; covers: WZ <br/>
a = `0x17`, b = `0x0c`, c = `0x00`; covers: WZ <br/>
a = `0x13`, b = `0x08`, c = `0x40`; covers: WZ <br/>
a = `0x17`, b = `0x08`, c = `0x10`; covers: WZ <br/>
... <br/>
a = 0x17, b = 0x00, c = 0x01; covers: <em>WXY</em>
</div>

:::

:::::

::::::

### coverage-guided example (2a)

:::::: {.columns}

::::: {.column width=30%}

```c
{{< include /testing/_coverage-example2.c >}}
```

:::::


::::: {.column .fragment fragment-index=1 style="font-size:90%"}

initial test case A:<br/>
a = 0x17, b = 0x08, c = 0x00; covers: WZ

found test case B (based on A):<br/>
a = 0x17, b = 0x00, c = 0x01; covers: WXY


::: {.fragment fragment-index=2}

generate random test cases based on A and B:

<div style="border: 3px dashed black; width: fit-content; padding-left: .5rem; padding-right: .5rem; font-size: 90%">
a = `0x37`, b = `0x08`, c = `0x00`; covers: WZ <br/>
a = `0x17`, b = `0x00`, c = `0x03`; covers: WXY<br/>
a = `0x17`, b = `0x0c`, c = `0x00`; covers: WZ <br/>
a = `0x37`, b = `0x00`, c = `0x03`; covers: WXY<br/>
a = `0x17`, b = `0x08`, c = `0x10`; covers: WZ <br/>
... <br/>
a = `0x17`, b = `0x00`, c = `0x81`; covers: <em>WY</em>
</div>

:::

:::::

::::::



### coverage-guided example 

<!-- \lstset{language=C,style=script} -->
  

::: {.r-stack .my-full}
![](/testing/texfig/coverageSame.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}

![](/testing/texfig/coverageSame.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}

![](/testing/texfig/coverageSame.figure-3.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=3}

![](/testing/texfig/coverageSame.figure-4.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=4}


:::


### coverage-guided example 

<!-- \lstset{language=C,style=smaller} -->
  

::: {.r-stack .my-full}
![](/testing/texfig/coverageExBig.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}

![](/testing/texfig/coverageExBig.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}

![](/testing/texfig/coverageExBig.figure-3.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=3}

![](/testing/texfig/coverageExBig.figure-4.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=4}


:::
